metadata.methodology: Hebbian superorganism annotation: canonical phase sequences and cell assemblies defined a priori; individuals mapped by Claude Opus 4.6 at temperature=0.3

phase_sequences.name: Global AI Supremacy
phase_sequences.definition: Race among state and corporate actors to develop, deploy, and leverage dominant AI capabilities — the primary technological competition of the era.

phase_sequences.name: US-China Strategic Bifurcation
phase_sequences.definition: Technological, economic, and military decoupling of the world's two largest powers into parallel global systems — trade blocs, chip stacks, payment rails, and alliances.

phase_sequences.name: Multiplanetary Expansion
phase_sequences.definition: Establishment of permanent human presence beyond Earth, driven by private space enterprise and competing national space programs.

phase_sequences.name: Dollar Hegemony Defense
phase_sequences.definition: Coordinated maintenance of the USD as the world's reserve currency through monetary policy, sanctions architecture, and geopolitical leverage against alternatives (BRICS currencies, digital yuan).

phase_sequences.name: Eurasian Resistance Arc
phase_sequences.definition: Russia-China-Iran strategic coordination to counterbalance the Western-led international order — shared interest in multipolar world, sanctions evasion, and alternative institutions.

phase_sequences.name: Middle East Power Realignment
phase_sequences.definition: Post-Gaza restructuring of regional alliances, normalization dynamics, and Iranian containment — reshaping the security and diplomatic architecture of the Middle East.

phase_sequences.name: Semiconductor Sovereignty Race
phase_sequences.definition: National competition for control of advanced chip design, fabrication, and supply chain — the decisive chokepoint of the AI and defense technology era.

phase_sequences.name: Global Energy Transition
phase_sequences.definition: Shift from fossil fuel dependence to renewable energy while managing near-term energy security — a decades-long metabolic transformation of the global economy.

phase_sequences.name: Information & Narrative Control
phase_sequences.definition: Platform-mediated competition over global information flows, algorithmic curation, and ideological framing — who controls what billions of people see and believe.

phase_sequences.name: Western Alliance Reformation
phase_sequences.definition: Restructuring of NATO, transatlantic economic ties, and liberal international institutions under new geopolitical pressures — redefining who bears costs and who calls shots.

East.character: Collective, state-centric, long-horizon, hierarchical — Russia firmly East-aligned post-2022

Bridge.character: Non-aligned, leverage-based swing actors who maintain optionality between East and West systems

Ancestral.character: Oldest civilizational substrate — foundational patterns; not yet prime-mover-generating in the current model snapshot

superorganism_list.name: Xi Jinping
superorganism_list.justification: As China's paramount leader, he exercises centralized control over the world's second-largest economy and military, shapes global trade and technology competition, and drives geopolitical realignment through initiatives like Belt and Road and expanding diplomatic reach.
superorganism_list.consensus_notes: Unanimous #1 or top-2 across all four models; no disagreement on his primacy.

superorganism.neuron_role: Central command neuron of the Eastern hemisphere — integrates state, military, and economic signals into unified long-horizon strategic output
superorganism.neuron_type: Tonic-firing inhibitory/excitatory neuron — sustained, high-authority signaling that maintains hierarchical coherence across vast assemblies

cell_assemblies.name: CCP (Chinese Communist Party)
cell_assemblies.role: Core assembly through which all domestic and foreign policy signals propagate

cell_assemblies.name: PLA (People's Liberation Army)
cell_assemblies.role: Military instrument for PS-02 and PS-05 strategic posturing

cell_assemblies.name: Belt and Road Initiative (BRI)
cell_assemblies.role: Primary infrastructure for extending Eastern influence globally, key to PS-05

cell_assemblies.name: CIPS (Cross-Border Interbank Payment System)
cell_assemblies.role: Alternative financial rail undermining PS-04 dollar hegemony

phase_sequences.name: US-China Strategic Bifurcation
phase_sequences.role: Principal Eastern architect of decoupling — drives parallel tech stack, trade blocs, and alliance systems

phase_sequences.name: Eurasian Resistance Arc
phase_sequences.role: Senior partner in Russia-China-Iran coordination against Western-led order

phase_sequences.name: Semiconductor Sovereignty Race
phase_sequences.role: Drives massive state investment in domestic chip fabrication to escape Western chokepoints

phase_sequences.name: Global AI Supremacy
phase_sequences.role: State-directed AI development competing for parity or dominance with Western frontier labs

phase_sequences.name: Dollar Hegemony Defense
phase_sequences.role: Primary adversary — promotes yuan internationalization, BRICS currency alternatives, and CIPS adoption

superorganism_list.name: Donald Trump
superorganism_list.justification: As the 47th President of the United States, he is actively reshaping global trade through aggressive tariffs, reorienting U.S. foreign policy and alliances, and driving massive downstream effects on the international order from the world's largest economy.
superorganism_list.consensus_notes: Listed by Claude (#2) and Grok (#2); ChatGPT erroneously listed Biden; Gemini omitted the U.S. president from its list entirely. Peer reviews confirmed Trump is the correct sitting president as of February 2026.

superorganism.neuron_role: Executive command neuron of the Western hemisphere — high-amplitude signals that reorganize alliances, trade flows, and institutional norms
superorganism.neuron_type: Burst-firing excitatory neuron — irregular, high-impact discharges that destabilize existing patterns and force rapid assembly reconfiguration

cell_assemblies.name: Trump Administration
cell_assemblies.role: Primary executive assembly for US federal policy across all phase sequences

cell_assemblies.name: MAGA Movement
cell_assemblies.role: Mass populist assembly providing political energy and electoral mandate

cell_assemblies.name: Republican Party
cell_assemblies.role: Legislative and institutional vehicle for policy implementation

cell_assemblies.name: DOGE (Department of Government Efficiency)
cell_assemblies.role: Internal restructuring tool for federal government metabolism

phase_sequences.name: US-China Strategic Bifurcation
phase_sequences.role: Primary Western driver of decoupling through tariffs, export controls, and economic confrontation

phase_sequences.name: Western Alliance Reformation
phase_sequences.role: Disruptive force reshaping NATO burden-sharing, transatlantic relations, and liberal institutional norms

phase_sequences.name: Dollar Hegemony Defense
phase_sequences.role: Wields sanctions and trade policy to maintain dollar centrality while pressuring alternatives

phase_sequences.name: Information & Narrative Control
phase_sequences.role: Dominant narrative actor who shapes global media cycles and political discourse

phase_sequences.name: Middle East Power Realignment
phase_sequences.role: Key external actor influencing normalization dynamics and regional security architecture

superorganism_list.name: Elon Musk
superorganism_list.justification: His simultaneous leadership of Tesla, SpaceX, xAI, and X, combined with his role directing the Department of Government Efficiency (DOGE) inside the Trump administration, gives him an unprecedented fusion of private-sector technological power and direct influence over U.S. federal operations.
superorganism_list.consensus_notes: All four models included Musk in their top 5-9; Claude and Grok specifically noted his government role. Peer reviews from Claude, Grok, and Gemini validated the DOGE detail as accurate for the timeline.

superorganism.neuron_role: Motor initiation neuron — fires novel, high-amplitude signals that reorganize large assemblies across the organism
superorganism.neuron_type: Burst-firing excitatory neuron — intermittent but high-amplitude influence across multiple assemblies simultaneously

cell_assemblies.name: SpaceX
cell_assemblies.role: Primary driver of PS-03

cell_assemblies.name: Tesla
cell_assemblies.role: Major actor in PS-08 energy transition and global EV manufacturing

cell_assemblies.name: xAI
cell_assemblies.role: Competitor in PS-01

cell_assemblies.name: X (Twitter)
cell_assemblies.role: Primary platform for PS-09

cell_assemblies.name: DOGE (Department of Government Efficiency)
cell_assemblies.role: Metabolic regulator of US executive function

phase_sequences.name: Multiplanetary Expansion
phase_sequences.role: Primary architect and sole industrial executor of human Mars colonization

phase_sequences.name: Global AI Supremacy
phase_sequences.role: Competing actor via xAI; also controls critical AI infrastructure

phase_sequences.name: Information & Narrative Control
phase_sequences.role: Platform owner with direct global reach through X

phase_sequences.name: Global Energy Transition
phase_sequences.role: Drives mass EV adoption and battery/solar deployment through Tesla

superorganism_list.name: Vladimir Putin
superorganism_list.justification: As Russia's president prosecuting the ongoing war in Ukraine, he continues to destabilize European security, disrupt global energy markets, control a vast nuclear arsenal, and force a fundamental reorientation of Western defense and foreign policy.
superorganism_list.consensus_notes: All four models included Putin in their top 5; strong consensus on his destabilizing influence through the Ukraine conflict and energy leverage.

superorganism.neuron_role: Survival-mode command neuron — sustains high-frequency defensive firing that forces continuous Western resource allocation and alliance reconfiguration
superorganism.neuron_type: Tonic-firing excitatory neuron — persistent, escalation-prone signaling that maintains conflict state and prevents system relaxation

cell_assemblies.name: Russian Federation Executive
cell_assemblies.role: Centralized command assembly for all Russian state action

cell_assemblies.name: FSB
cell_assemblies.role: Intelligence and internal security apparatus supporting regime stability and hybrid warfare

cell_assemblies.name: Gazprom / Rosneft
cell_assemblies.role: Energy weapon assemblies for geopolitical leverage and sanctions evasion

cell_assemblies.name: CSTO (Collective Security Treaty Organization)
cell_assemblies.role: Military alliance structure for Eurasian sphere maintenance

phase_sequences.name: Eurasian Resistance Arc
phase_sequences.role: Primary initiator — war in Ukraine catalyzed Russia-China-Iran strategic alignment

phase_sequences.name: Western Alliance Reformation
phase_sequences.role: Adversarial catalyst forcing NATO restructuring and European defense integration

phase_sequences.name: Global Energy Transition
phase_sequences.role: Disruptive force — weaponization of energy supply accelerates and complicates transition

phase_sequences.name: Dollar Hegemony Defense
phase_sequences.role: Active adversary pursuing sanctions evasion and alternative payment systems

phase_sequences.name: US-China Strategic Bifurcation
phase_sequences.role: Junior Eastern partner whose conflict accelerates global bloc formation

superorganism_list.name: Narendra Modi
superorganism_list.justification: As Prime Minister of the world's most populous nation and fastest-growing major economy, he shapes global supply chains, digital infrastructure, technology labor markets, and the geopolitical balance as a pivotal swing power between East and West.
superorganism_list.consensus_notes: All four models included Modi in their top 4-6; universally recognized as leading a decisive swing power with enormous economic and demographic weight.

superorganism.neuron_role: Bridge integrator neuron — maintains optionality between East and West while channeling massive demographic and economic potential
superorganism.neuron_type: Adaptive oscillatory neuron — modulates firing frequency based on geopolitical context, maintaining non-aligned flexibility

cell_assemblies.name: BJP (Bharatiya Janata Party)
cell_assemblies.role: Dominant political assembly providing domestic mandate and ideological coherence

cell_assemblies.name: Digital India Initiative
cell_assemblies.role: Digital infrastructure assembly enabling tech sovereignty and service economy growth

cell_assemblies.name: Make in India
cell_assemblies.role: Manufacturing assembly for supply chain diversification away from China, relevant to PS-07

cell_assemblies.name: RSS (Rashtriya Swayamsevak Sangh)
cell_assemblies.role: Deep ideological assembly providing cultural-nationalist substrate for BJP governance

phase_sequences.name: US-China Strategic Bifurcation
phase_sequences.role: Critical swing actor — alternative manufacturing base and strategic partner courted by both blocs

phase_sequences.name: Semiconductor Sovereignty Race
phase_sequences.role: Emerging competitor attracting fab investment as supply chain diversification destination

phase_sequences.name: Global Energy Transition
phase_sequences.role: Massive demand-side actor balancing renewable ambitions with fossil fuel dependence

phase_sequences.name: Eurasian Resistance Arc
phase_sequences.role: Selective participant — maintains Russian energy ties while deepening Western tech partnerships

superorganism_list.name: Jensen Huang
superorganism_list.justification: As CEO of NVIDIA, he controls the critical bottleneck hardware powering the global AI revolution, making his company's chip allocation and architecture decisions a primary determinant of which nations and companies lead in artificial intelligence.
superorganism_list.consensus_notes: All four models included Huang (ranked #4-#11); Gemini notably placed him at #4, and Claude's peer review praised this as a genuinely insightful pick reflecting structural power over AI compute.

superorganism.neuron_role: Chokepoint gatekeeper neuron — controls the critical hardware bottleneck through which all AI capability must flow
superorganism.neuron_type: High-frequency tonic neuron — steady, indispensable signaling that enables or constrains firing across nearly all other AI-related assemblies

cell_assemblies.name: NVIDIA
cell_assemblies.role: Dominant GPU supplier and primary hardware enabler of PS-01

cell_assemblies.name: CUDA Ecosystem
cell_assemblies.role: Software lock-in assembly that entrenches NVIDIA's position as AI compute standard

phase_sequences.name: Global AI Supremacy
phase_sequences.role: Controls the decisive hardware bottleneck — chip allocation determines who can train frontier models

phase_sequences.name: Semiconductor Sovereignty Race
phase_sequences.role: Central actor whose supply chain dependencies (TSMC) and export compliance shape national chip strategies

phase_sequences.name: US-China Strategic Bifurcation
phase_sequences.role: Involuntary enforcement mechanism — US export controls on NVIDIA chips are a primary decoupling tool

superorganism_list.name: Jerome Powell
superorganism_list.justification: As Chair of the U.S. Federal Reserve with his term active through May 2026, his interest-rate decisions and monetary policy guidance directly move global capital markets, influence the value of the world's reserve currency, and set the tone for central banks worldwide.
superorganism_list.consensus_notes: All four models included Powell (ranked #4-#15); universally recognized for his outsized impact on global financial conditions through the dollar system.

superorganism.neuron_role: Metabolic regulator neuron — sets the baseline interest rate signal that modulates global capital flows and economic activity
superorganism.neuron_type: Pacemaker neuron — rhythmic, calibrated signaling that sets tempo for global financial system oscillations

cell_assemblies.name: Federal Reserve System
cell_assemblies.role: Core monetary policy assembly governing USD liquidity and global capital conditions

cell_assemblies.name: FOMC (Federal Open Market Committee)
cell_assemblies.role: Decision-making body for interest rate policy, directly affecting PS-04

phase_sequences.name: Dollar Hegemony Defense
phase_sequences.role: Primary institutional defender — rate decisions and liquidity management sustain dollar reserve status

phase_sequences.name: Global Energy Transition
phase_sequences.role: Interest rate environment shapes capital availability for renewable energy investment at scale

superorganism_list.name: Mohammed bin Salman
superorganism_list.justification: As Crown Prince and de facto ruler of Saudi Arabia, he controls the world's swing oil production capacity, leads OPEC+ coordination, manages a $900B+ sovereign wealth fund driving cross-border investment, and is a decisive actor in Middle East stability and diplomacy.
superorganism_list.consensus_notes: All four models included MBS (ranked #6-#10); strong consensus on his outsized influence over energy markets, regional security, and global capital flows.

superorganism.neuron_role: Energy-geopolitical bridge neuron — controls swing oil capacity and sovereign capital while maintaining strategic optionality between all major blocs
superorganism.neuron_type: Variable-frequency oscillatory neuron — modulates output based on oil market conditions and geopolitical alignment opportunities

cell_assemblies.name: Saudi Aramco
cell_assemblies.role: World's largest oil producer and primary lever for energy market influence

cell_assemblies.name: OPEC+
cell_assemblies.role: Cartel coordination assembly for global oil supply management

cell_assemblies.name: Public Investment Fund (PIF)
cell_assemblies.role: Sovereign wealth vehicle for cross-border capital deployment and economic diversification

cell_assemblies.name: Vision 2030
cell_assemblies.role: Domestic transformation assembly for post-oil economic restructuring

phase_sequences.name: Middle East Power Realignment
phase_sequences.role: Central architect of post-Gaza regional order, normalization dynamics, and Iranian containment

phase_sequences.name: Global Energy Transition
phase_sequences.role: Swing producer managing fossil-to-renewable transition timeline and oil price stability

phase_sequences.name: Dollar Hegemony Defense
phase_sequences.role: Petrodollar anchor — Saudi oil pricing in USD is foundational to dollar reserve status

phase_sequences.name: Eurasian Resistance Arc
phase_sequences.role: Selective engagement — OPEC+ coordination with Russia while maintaining Western security ties

phase_sequences.name: US-China Strategic Bifurcation
phase_sequences.role: Swing actor courted by both sides for energy supply and investment capital

superorganism_list.name: Sam Altman
superorganism_list.justification: As CEO of OpenAI, he steers the development and deployment of the most influential frontier AI systems, reshaping knowledge work, software industries, and driving global policy conversations on AI governance and existential risk.
superorganism_list.consensus_notes: All four models included Altman (ranked #8-#11); consensus that he sits at the frontier of the most transformative technology of the era.

superorganism.neuron_role: Frontier capability neuron — generates the most advanced AI signals that propagate across all sectors and force global policy responses
superorganism.neuron_type: Burst-firing excitatory neuron — each model release sends high-amplitude capability shocks through the global system

cell_assemblies.name: OpenAI
cell_assemblies.role: Leading frontier AI lab and primary driver of PS-01 capability advances

cell_assemblies.name: Microsoft
cell_assemblies.role: Strategic infrastructure partner providing compute and distribution for OpenAI models

cell_assemblies.name: Worldcoin
cell_assemblies.role: Digital identity and financial inclusion initiative with global ambitions

phase_sequences.name: Global AI Supremacy
phase_sequences.role: Primary capability driver — OpenAI's model releases define the frontier and set the pace of the race

phase_sequences.name: Information & Narrative Control
phase_sequences.role: AI-generated content and chatbot interfaces reshape how information is produced and consumed

superorganism_list.name: Satya Nadella
superorganism_list.justification: As CEO of Microsoft, the world's most valuable company and OpenAI's key infrastructure partner, he is integrating AI across the global enterprise software stack used by billions and steering massive cloud and computing infrastructure investments.
superorganism_list.consensus_notes: Included by Claude (#9), Gemini (#8), and ChatGPT (#13); recognized for translating AI breakthroughs into enterprise-scale deployment affecting productivity worldwide.

superorganism.neuron_role: Infrastructure integration neuron — embeds AI capability into the global enterprise substrate through cloud and software distribution
superorganism.neuron_type: Tonic-firing facilitatory neuron — steady, pervasive signaling that enables other neurons and assemblies to function at higher capacity

cell_assemblies.name: Microsoft
cell_assemblies.role: World's most valuable company and primary enterprise AI distribution platform

cell_assemblies.name: Azure Cloud
cell_assemblies.role: Cloud infrastructure assembly providing compute backbone for AI deployment globally

cell_assemblies.name: GitHub
cell_assemblies.role: Developer platform assembly shaping global software production and AI code integration

cell_assemblies.name: OpenAI
cell_assemblies.role: Strategic AI partner — Microsoft's investment and infrastructure enable OpenAI's frontier research

phase_sequences.name: Global AI Supremacy
phase_sequences.role: Primary infrastructure provider and distribution channel for frontier AI into enterprise and government

phase_sequences.name: Semiconductor Sovereignty Race
phase_sequences.role: Major demand-side actor whose compute requirements shape chip procurement and data center buildout

phase_sequences.name: Information & Narrative Control
phase_sequences.role: AI integration into productivity tools reshapes how information is created and processed at scale

superorganism_list.name: Ursula von der Leyen
superorganism_list.justification: As President of the European Commission, she drives regulatory frameworks—including the AI Act, Digital Markets Act, and climate policy—that set global compliance standards, while coordinating Europe's response to trade wars, defense integration, and the Ukraine crisis.
superorganism_list.consensus_notes: Included by three of four models (Claude #13, ChatGPT #5, Grok #6, Gemini #12); ChatGPT and Grok ranked her particularly high for institutional regulatory power.

superorganism.neuron_role: Regulatory command neuron — generates compliance signals that propagate globally through the Brussels Effect, shaping technology, trade, and security norms
superorganism.neuron_type: Tonic inhibitory neuron — sustained regulatory signaling that constrains and channels the behavior of other assemblies worldwide

cell_assemblies.name: European Commission
cell_assemblies.role: Executive assembly of the EU driving regulation, trade policy, and strategic autonomy

cell_assemblies.name: EU Regulatory Apparatus
cell_assemblies.role: Norm-setting assembly whose AI Act, DMA, and climate rules create global compliance standards

cell_assemblies.name: NATO
cell_assemblies.role: Security alliance assembly being restructured under European defense integration pressure

cell_assemblies.name: G7 / G20
cell_assemblies.role: Multilateral coordination assembly for Western economic and security alignment

phase_sequences.name: Western Alliance Reformation
phase_sequences.role: Key architect of European strategic autonomy and NATO burden-sharing restructuring

phase_sequences.name: Global AI Supremacy
phase_sequences.role: Regulatory shaper — AI Act and digital rules constrain and direct AI development globally

phase_sequences.name: Global Energy Transition
phase_sequences.role: Drives EU Green Deal and climate policy that sets global transition benchmarks

phase_sequences.name: US-China Strategic Bifurcation
phase_sequences.role: Manages European positioning between US and China on trade, tech, and investment screening

superorganism_list.name: Mark Zuckerberg
superorganism_list.justification: As CEO of Meta, he controls platforms (Facebook, Instagram, WhatsApp, Threads) connecting nearly half the global population, giving him enormous influence over information flows, public discourse, and—through investment in open-source AI—industry standards for AI development.
superorganism_list.consensus_notes: Included by three of four models (Claude #12, Grok #14, Gemini #11); recognized for unparalleled reach in global communications and growing AI influence.

superorganism.neuron_role: Mass connectivity neuron — controls the largest social graph on Earth, mediating information flow and social coordination for nearly half of humanity
superorganism.neuron_type: High-frequency tonic neuron — continuous, pervasive signaling through billions of daily platform interactions that shape global discourse

cell_assemblies.name: Meta
cell_assemblies.role: Parent assembly controlling the world's largest social media ecosystem

cell_assemblies.name: Facebook
cell_assemblies.role: Primary social platform with ~3B users shaping information flows globally

cell_assemblies.name: Instagram
cell_assemblies.role: Visual media platform influencing culture, commerce, and narrative

cell_assemblies.name: WhatsApp
cell_assemblies.role: Dominant messaging platform in Global South, critical communication infrastructure

phase_sequences.name: Information & Narrative Control
phase_sequences.role: Controls the largest platforms for global information distribution, algorithmic curation, and public discourse

phase_sequences.name: Global AI Supremacy
phase_sequences.role: Major open-source AI competitor via Llama models, shaping industry standards and democratizing access

superorganism_list.name: Benjamin Netanyahu
superorganism_list.justification: As Prime Minister of Israel, his prosecution of military operations in Gaza and strategic decisions regarding Iran and regional security are actively reshaping the Middle East and driving global diplomatic, humanitarian, and security debates.
superorganism_list.consensus_notes: Included by Claude (#14), ChatGPT (#16), and Grok (not listed but context supports); his acute influence on a major active conflict zone justifies inclusion.

superorganism.neuron_role: Regional escalation neuron — fires high-intensity security signals that reshape Middle Eastern alliances and force global diplomatic responses
superorganism.neuron_type: Burst-firing excitatory neuron — crisis-driven, high-amplitude signaling that triggers cascading responses across regional and global assemblies

cell_assemblies.name: IDF (Israel Defense Forces)
cell_assemblies.role: Primary military instrument for Gaza operations and regional force projection

cell_assemblies.name: Mossad
cell_assemblies.role: Intelligence assembly for covert operations, Iranian containment, and strategic disruption

cell_assemblies.name: Likud
cell_assemblies.role: Political assembly providing domestic mandate and coalition governance

phase_sequences.name: Middle East Power Realignment
phase_sequences.role: Primary catalyst — Gaza operations and Iran strategy are reshaping the entire regional security architecture

phase_sequences.name: Western Alliance Reformation
phase_sequences.role: Stress-tests Western alliance cohesion through divergent responses to Israeli military operations

phase_sequences.name: Eurasian Resistance Arc
phase_sequences.role: Adversarial target — Israeli actions against Iran and proxies directly confront the Axis of Resistance

superorganism_list.name: Ali Khamenei
superorganism_list.justification: As Supreme Leader of Iran, he directs a network of regional proxy forces, controls Iran's nuclear program decisions, and is a central figure in Middle Eastern instability whose choices directly affect oil markets, escalation risks, and global security.
superorganism_list.consensus_notes: Included by Claude (#17) and ChatGPT (#17); his role as the ultimate decision-maker behind Iran's destabilizing regional posture warrants inclusion despite lower individual rankings.

superorganism.neuron_role: Asymmetric resistance neuron — sustains proxy network signaling that destabilizes regional order and constrains Western and Israeli freedom of action
superorganism.neuron_type: Tonic-firing inhibitory neuron — persistent, low-to-medium amplitude signaling through distributed proxy networks that impose costs on adversaries

cell_assemblies.name: IRGC (Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps)
cell_assemblies.role: Primary military-intelligence assembly for regional power projection and proxy coordination

cell_assemblies.name: Axis of Resistance (Hezbollah / Hamas / Houthis)
cell_assemblies.role: Distributed proxy network executing asymmetric warfare across the Middle East

phase_sequences.name: Middle East Power Realignment
phase_sequences.role: Central antagonist — proxy network and nuclear program are primary drivers of regional instability

phase_sequences.name: Eurasian Resistance Arc
phase_sequences.role: Key partner in Russia-China-Iran axis — provides regional disruption capability and sanctions evasion cooperation

phase_sequences.name: Global Energy Transition
phase_sequences.role: Threat to energy security — Houthi attacks on shipping and Strait of Hormuz risk disrupt global oil flows

superorganism_list.name: Tim Cook
superorganism_list.justification: As CEO of Apple, he oversees an ecosystem touching over two billion active devices globally, makes supply-chain decisions that shape manufacturing across China and India, and sets influential standards for consumer privacy and app-economy governance.
superorganism_list.consensus_notes: Included by Claude (#11), ChatGPT (#12), and Gemini (#14); consistent recognition of his influence through the world's most valuable hardware ecosystem.

superorganism.neuron_role: Supply chain integration neuron — bridges US-China manufacturing dependencies while controlling the consumer device ecosystem through which billions access digital services
superorganism.neuron_type: Tonic-firing modulatory neuron — steady, consistent signaling that shapes ecosystem standards, supply chain geography, and privacy norms

cell_assemblies.name: Apple
cell_assemblies.role: World's largest consumer technology company with 2B+ active devices globally

cell_assemblies.name: App Store Ecosystem
cell_assemblies.role: Platform governance assembly controlling app distribution, developer economics, and privacy standards

phase_sequences.name: US-China Strategic Bifurcation
phase_sequences.role: Critical stress point — Apple's deep China manufacturing dependence makes it a barometer and actor in decoupling dynamics

phase_sequences.name: Semiconductor Sovereignty Race
phase_sequences.role: Major demand-side actor whose chip design (Apple Silicon) and TSMC dependence shape semiconductor strategy

phase_sequences.name: Information & Narrative Control
phase_sequences.role: App Store and privacy policies shape what information reaches billions of device users

superorganism_list.name: Larry Fink
superorganism_list.justification: As CEO of BlackRock, the world's largest asset manager overseeing tens of trillions in assets, he influences global capital allocation, corporate governance priorities, and risk pricing at a scale that shapes markets and policy agendas worldwide.
superorganism_list.consensus_notes: Included by ChatGPT (#14), Grok (#16), and Gemini (#10); recognized for structural influence over how global capital flows and corporate behavior are shaped.

superorganism.neuron_role: Capital allocation neuron — directs the largest pool of managed assets on Earth, shaping corporate governance, risk pricing, and investment flows across all sectors
superorganism.neuron_type: Tonic-firing modulatory neuron — steady, pervasive influence through capital allocation signals that shape behavior of corporations and governments globally

cell_assemblies.name: BlackRock
cell_assemblies.role: World's largest asset manager with $10T+ AUM shaping global capital flows

cell_assemblies.name: Aladdin Platform
cell_assemblies.role: Risk analytics infrastructure used by institutions managing ~$20T+ in assets, embedding BlackRock's risk models into global finance

phase_sequences.name: Dollar Hegemony Defense
phase_sequences.role: Reinforces dollar-denominated capital markets as the default global investment substrate

phase_sequences.name: Global Energy Transition
phase_sequences.role: Capital allocation decisions on ESG and energy investments materially shape transition pace and direction

phase_sequences.name: Global AI Supremacy
phase_sequences.role: Major capital allocator to AI infrastructure buildout through equity and debt markets

superorganism_list.name: Christine Lagarde
superorganism_list.justification: As President of the European Central Bank, she manages monetary policy for the Eurozone—the world's second-largest reserve currency bloc—impacting financial stability, inflation, capital flows, and crisis management across Europe and globally.
superorganism_list.consensus_notes: Included by ChatGPT (#7) and Gemini (#15); provides essential domain coverage in global monetary policy alongside Powell, reflecting the dual-pillar nature of the world's financial system.

superorganism.neuron_role: European metabolic regulator neuron — sets monetary conditions for the world's second-largest currency bloc, stabilizing or stressing the Eurozone financial system
superorganism.neuron_type: Pacemaker neuron — rhythmic, calibrated signaling that maintains Eurozone financial stability and coordinates with global monetary tempo

cell_assemblies.name: European Central Bank (ECB)
cell_assemblies.role: Core monetary policy assembly for the Eurozone, managing inflation, rates, and financial stability

cell_assemblies.name: Eurozone Banking System
cell_assemblies.role: Transmission assembly through which ECB policy propagates to the real economy

cell_assemblies.name: IMF (International Monetary Fund)
cell_assemblies.role: Former leadership role; ongoing institutional influence on global financial governance norms

phase_sequences.name: Dollar Hegemony Defense
phase_sequences.role: Euro steward — manages the primary alternative reserve currency, both complementing and competing with dollar dominance

phase_sequences.name: Western Alliance Reformation
phase_sequences.role: Monetary policy coordination with Fed shapes transatlantic economic alignment and European strategic capacity

phase_sequences.name: Global Energy Transition
phase_sequences.role: ECB green finance policies and rate environment shape European energy transition investment
